finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_13.md:3; chapters/chapter_13.md:37; chapters/chapter_13.md:67; chapters/chapter_13.md:167; chapters/chapter_13.md:379; chapters/chapter_13.md:385; chapters/chapter_13.md:399
finding_results.notes: Reduced the repeated facility-atmosphere wording by keeping only two exact 'fluorescent' uses and replacing later repetitions with more specific alternatives. The chapter now contains zero exact 'hum' uses, zero exact 'humming' uses, and one 'hummed' use.

Five revisions across two scenes. (1) Yusuf's aphorism 'don't confuse it with punishment' replaced with tired, fragmented Birmingham-register speech that conveys the same reassurance through technical framing ('That's just the gap, yeah? The system was filling all of that in'). (2) Lena's composed 'taking time I was alive for' replaced with rougher experiential description including self-interruption ('I didn't — I didn't know how I got there. Minutes just gone'). (3) The quotable X-versus-Y contrast 'keeping me in line / taking over the line' replaced with flat experiential statement ('Because I wasn't swimming... The stroke was there. I wasn't'), with Dara anchoring to the concrete cost ('That's five seconds, Lena'). (4) Narrator certification paragraph ('The question landed... heavy and not theatrical') replaced with one-line physical beat ('Water lapped the gutter between them'). (5) Abstract meta-label exchange ('Bad timing for philosophy' / 'This isn't philosophy') replaced with grounded pool-partner speech ('Eat something' / 'That's not going to change the answer'). All three required facts preserved: Lena lost conscious time (line 479), the patch cost five seconds at easy pace (lines 473, 501), and Lena would still choose it (lines 517-519, 535).

pass_summaries.summary: Condensed the diagnostic middle so the chapter proves Lena's cost once and then moves into silence and the pool proof faster, while trimming the repeated facility-lighting and hum vocabulary to within the packet target.

Roughened five composed-thematic passages across the Yusuf departure and Dara pool exchange. Replaced Yusuf's clean aphorism with tired Birmingham fragments, Lena's balanced contrast line with flat experiential speech plus self-correction, and Dara's meta-label with concrete training-partner dialogue. Removed narrator certification of dialogue weight. All three acceptance-test facts (lost time, five-second cost, would choose again) still arrive through scene-pressured speech and physical business. No continuity, heading, or structural changes.

summary: Merged three-pass revision report (FIXED=3, PARTIAL=0, UNRESOLVED=0).
